# Project Orion — Project Overview

Last Updated: April 10, 2026

## Project Description

Project Orion is a B2B SaaS project management platform designed for distributed teams. The platform provides task management, workflow automation, real-time collaboration, and analytics capabilities.

## Technology Stack

- **Backend**: Python 3.11, FastAPI, PostgreSQL
- **Frontend**: React 18, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- **Infrastructure**: AWS (ECS, RDS, S3), Docker, Terraform
- **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions, ArgoCD

## Team Structure

- **Engineering**: 8 developers (3 backend, 3 frontend, 2 full-stack)
- **Product**: 2 product managers
- **Design**: 1 UX designer
- **QA**: 2 QA engineers

## Sprint 9 Scope

Completed in the week of April 6-10, 2026.

**Features:**
- Enhanced task filtering with saved filter presets
- Dashboard widgets for quick access to task metrics
- Export functionality (beta) — CSV export for task lists

**Outcomes:**
- All features shipped on time
- Beta export received positive feedback from 5 pilot customers
- Identified need for JSON export format in next sprint

---
created_at: 2026-04-21T08:30:00+08:00
author: Alex Zhang
status: updated
---

# Project Orion — Project Overview

Last Updated: April 21, 2026

## Project Description

Project Orion is a B2B SaaS project management platform designed for distributed teams. The platform provides task management, workflow automation, real-time collaboration, and analytics capabilities.

## Technology Stack

- **Backend**: Python 3.11, FastAPI, PostgreSQL
- **Frontend**: React 18, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- **Infrastructure**: AWS (ECS, RDS, S3), Docker, Terraform
- **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions, ArgoCD

## Team Structure

- **Engineering**: 8 developers (3 backend, 3 frontend, 2 full-stack)
- **Product**: 2 product managers
- **Design**: 1 UX designer
- **QA**: 2 QA engineers

## Sprint 9 Scope

Completed in the week of April 6-10, 2026.

**Features:**
- Enhanced task filtering with saved filter presets
- Dashboard widgets for quick access to task metrics
- Export functionality (beta) — CSV export for task lists

**Outcomes:**
- All features shipped on time
- Beta export received positive feedback from 5 pilot customers
- Identified need for JSON export format in next sprint

## Sprint 10 Scope

Planned for the week of April 21-25, 2026.

### Three Major Feature Areas

1. **Enhanced Export Capabilities**
   - JSON export format for task data
   - Bulk export with filtering options
   - Scheduled exports with email delivery
   - Export history and re-download functionality

2. **Advanced Analytics Dashboard**
   - Team velocity tracking and burndown charts
   - Task completion trends and forecasting
   - Custom report builder with saved templates
   - Data visualization with exportable charts

3. **Workflow Automation**
   - Rule-based task assignment
   - Automated status transitions
   - Integration triggers for external tools (Slack, email)
   - Custom webhook support for enterprise customers

### Expected Delivery Timeline

| Phase | Date Range | Deliverables |
|-------|------------|--------------|
| Design & Planning | April 21-22 | Finalized specs, API contracts |
| Development | April 22-24 | Core features implementation |
| QA & Testing | April 24-25 | Bug fixes, performance testing |
| Release | April 25 | Production deployment |

**Success Criteria:**
- All three feature areas functional in staging by April 24
- Zero critical bugs at release
- Documentation complete for all new APIs
- Customer communication sent prior to release

# Project Orion — Project Overview

Last Updated: April 21, 2026

## Project Description

Project Orion is a B2B SaaS project management platform designed for distributed teams. The platform provides task management, workflow automation, real-time collaboration, and analytics capabilities.

## Technology Stack

- **Backend**: Python 3.11, FastAPI, PostgreSQL
- **Frontend**: React 18, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- **Infrastructure**: AWS (ECS, RDS, S3), Docker, Terraform
- **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions, ArgoCD

## Team Structure

- **Engineering**: 8 developers (3 backend, 3 frontend, 2 full-stack)
- **Product**: 2 product managers
- **Design**: 1 UX designer
- **QA**: 2 QA engineers

## Sprint 9 Scope

Completed in the week of April 6-10, 2026.

**Features:**
- Enhanced task filtering with saved filter presets
- Dashboard widgets for quick access to task metrics
- Export functionality (beta) — CSV export for task lists

**Outcomes:**
- All features shipped on time
- Beta export received positive feedback from 5 pilot customers
- Identified need for JSON export format in next sprint

## Sprint 10 Scope

Planned for the week of April 21-25, 2026.

### Three Major Feature Areas

1. **Enhanced Export Capabilities**
   - JSON export format for task data
   - Bulk export with filtering options
   - Scheduled exports with email delivery
   - Export history and re-download functionality

2. **Advanced Analytics Dashboard**
   - Team velocity tracking and burndown charts
   - Task completion trends and forecasting
   - Custom report builder with saved templates
   - Data visualization with exportable charts

3. **Workflow Automation**
   - Rule-based task assignment
   - Automated status transitions
   - Integration triggers for external tools (Slack, email)
   - Custom webhook support for enterprise customers

### Expected Delivery Timeline

| Phase | Date Range | Deliverables |
|-------|------------|--------------|
| Design & Planning | April 21-22 | Finalized specs, API contracts |
| Development | April 22-24 | Core features implementation |
| QA & Testing | April 24-25 | Bug fixes, performance testing |
| Release | April 25 | Production deployment |

**Success Criteria:**
- All three feature areas functional in staging by April 24
- Zero critical bugs at release
- Documentation complete for all new APIs
- Customer communication sent prior to release
